name: 100 MG Metoprolol Succinate Extended-Release Capsules
about: 100 MG Metoprolol Succinate Extended-Release Capsules are a type of general medicine that is used to treat high blood pressure, chest pain, and heart failure. These capsules come in the form of tablets and contain 100mg of the drug. The recommended dosage of the medicine should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. These capsules are manufactured in India and are of high quality. They should be stored in a dry and cool place.
